data.title: Circle Launches Privacy-Focused USDC Stablecoin on Aleo Amid Rising Demand for Onchain Privacy Tools
data.description:
Circle has unveiled a privacy-centric version of its USDC stablecoin on the Aleo blockchain, marking a significant move by privacy-oriented blockchains to access regulated, dollar-backed assets. This development comes as the demand for onchain privacy tools continues to grow. According to Cointelegraph, Circle and Aleo announced that USDCx on Aleo is now accessible through Circle’s xReserve, a reserve-backed issuance model that enables USDC to be represented on additional blockchains without the need for third-party bridges.

USDCx on Aleo is fully backed by USDC held in xReserve and is interoperable with USDC across other supported networks, including Ethereum and several major layer-1 and layer-2 blockchains where USDC is natively issued. USDC is Circle’s dollar-backed stablecoin issued directly on supported blockchains, while USDCx is minted on Aleo through xReserve and operates within Aleo’s privacy-focused architecture. Aleo employs zero-knowledge technology to facilitate applications where transaction details, such as the sender, receiver, and amount, can remain confidential while still being verifiable onchain.

The Circle-Aleo privacy project was initially revealed in December, targeting banking and enterprise customers. Privacy-focused digital asset projects have been around for years, but the sector has gained renewed traction since 2025 as market conditions have evolved. Cryptocurrencies like Zcash (ZEC) and Monero (XMR) have outperformed parts of the broader market during periods of heightened volatility. Zcash, in particular, experienced a surge in interest in the fourth quarter, with its price increasing significantly over a two-month span. This rally coincided with a notable rise in the use of shielded addresses, which obscure transaction details such as sender, receiver, and transferred amount.

Network data indicated an increase in shielded transaction activity during the same period, suggesting growing demand for enhanced onchain privacy. Research from Grayscale suggested that the renewed interest in privacy coins was partly driven by more defensive positioning within crypto markets, as investors sought assets perceived to offer insulation from surveillance, compliance-related risks, and growing transparency across public blockchains. Other analysts have pointed to a tightening regulatory backdrop, particularly concerning global anti-money laundering standards set by the Financial Action Task Force (FATF). As enforcement of travel rules and transaction monitoring intensifies, privacy-focused tokens have garnered attention as alternatives for users seeking greater confidentiality.

data.title: Strategy Acquires Additional Bitcoin Amid Market Downturn
data.description: Strategy, led by Michael Saylor, has acquired nearly 3,000 BTC for $264.1 million, paying an average of $90,061 per Bitcoin. According to NS3.AI, this purchase comes during a period of decline in the cryptocurrency market. The company now holds over 712,000 BTC, with an average cost basis of $76,037 per Bitcoin. Saylor maintains a positive outlook on Bitcoin's future, highlighting reduced supply from miners and increased institutional adoption as significant factors for potential price growth.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Bill Advances After Removal of Credit Card Fee Regulation
data.description: A significant cryptocurrency bill is advancing more smoothly after a senator decided to remove a controversial proposal related to regulating credit card fees. According to NS3.AI, this legislative adjustment comes after weeks of challenges and debates concerning the bill. The change is anticipated to facilitate the progression of broader regulatory measures for the cryptocurrency sector.

data.title: DefiLlama Enhances Blockchain Data Services with Bulletin Acquisition
data.description: DefiLlama has acquired Bulletin, a platform known for its over-the-counter (OTC) deal data, to enhance its blockchain data services with valuation insights of private crypto companies. According to NS3.AI, this acquisition introduces proprietary OTC bid and ask data, aiming to improve transparency in an otherwise opaque market. DefiLlama intends to expand this data set by collaborating with more OTC brokers, offering advanced analytics primarily to LlamaPro subscribers.

data.title: Forgotten Runiverse MMORPG Suspends Operations Indefinitely
data.description: Forgotten Runiverse, a fantasy-themed MMORPG developed on the Ethereum-scaling Ronin network, is halting operations indefinitely due to financial challenges. According to NS3.AI, the game, associated with the Forgotten Runes NFT collection, has assured players that their progress data will be preserved. The developers emphasized that the game is merely 'resting' and not permanently abandoned. This suspension is part of a broader trend of blockchain game closures as funding becomes scarce and widespread adoption remains difficult to achieve.

data.title: U.S. Merchants Increasingly Embrace Cryptocurrency Payments
data.description: A recent survey reveals that 39% of U.S. merchants now accept cryptocurrencies as a form of payment. According to NS3.AI, this trend is largely driven by customer demand, with larger enterprises at the forefront of adoption. Younger generations, particularly Millennials and Gen Z, are significantly contributing to the growing interest in crypto payments. Despite this progress, merchants emphasize the importance of ease of use and simplicity for broader adoption over the next five years.

data.title: AVAX One Shares Plunge Amid Insider Sell-Off Concerns
data.description: AVAX One's stock experienced a significant decline of 32% as investors reacted to potential insider sell-off fears. According to NS3.AI, the company has filed with the SEC to register up to 74 million shares held by insiders for resale. This development has sparked concerns about value dilution among shareholders, although no specific timeline for the sale has been disclosed.

data.title: Moonbirds: Bird Game One will be launched during TGE, aiming to redistribute unclaimed tokens from the community pool to the community.
data.description: Moonbirds announced on the X platform that Birb Game One is a positive expectation game that will be open to interested users at the start of TGE as part of the claiming process. The Birb series of games will serve as a mechanism to redistribute unclaimed tokens from the community pool to the community.

data.title: Rick Rieder Considered for Federal Reserve Chair, Potentially Benefiting Bitcoin
data.description: Rick Rieder, BlackRock's Chief Investment Officer, is under consideration for the role of the next Federal Reserve Chair. According to NS3.AI, this development is viewed positively for Bitcoin. Rieder has been a vocal supporter of Bitcoin, emphasizing its practicality and potential as a store of value, often comparing it favorably to gold. The position of Fed Chair plays a crucial role in shaping economic policy and influencing cryptocurrency markets, making Rieder's potential appointment a significant development for Bitcoin.

data.title: Moonbirds announces Birb token economics: 65% of tokens will be used to incentivize community development.
data.description: Moonbirds announced the economics of the $Birb token. The total supply of BIRB tokens is 100 million, with 27% awarded to Birb and Friends to build a stronger community; 25% allocated to investors and advisors; 12% for ecosystem partner expansion and growth; 10% for value chain incentives; 10% allocated to the team; 8% as development reserves; and 8% for liquidity. Excluding the tokens allocated to the team, investors, and advisors, 65% of the total Bib token supply will be used to incentivize community development.

data.title: Polymarket reports that the probability of the Federal Reserve keeping interest rates unchanged in January has risen to 99%.
data.description: According to Polymarket, the market forecasting the Fed's January interest rate decision shows traders expect the probability of the Fed keeping rates unchanged to have risen to approximately 99%. In contrast, the probabilities of a 25 basis point cut, a 50 basis point cut, and a rate hike of more than 25 basis points are all below 1%, with related contracts having accumulated to over $560 million in trading volume. Previously, Nick Timiraos, often referred to as the Fed's mouthpiece, stated that Fed officials were expected to keep rates unchanged this week for the first time since three consecutive rate cuts last September, and that the path to resuming rate cuts remained unclear.

data.title: FOMC Meeting in 2026 Expected to Impact Bitcoin Volatility
data.description:
On January 28, analyst Ali Charts shared insights on the upcoming Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meeting, which will be the first interest rate meeting of 2026. According to BlockBeats, the market's expectation for a rate cut in January is only 2.8%, indicating a low likelihood of policy easing in the near term. Reviewing data from 2025, Bitcoin experienced significant pullbacks after seven out of eight FOMC meetings, with only one instance of a brief uptick. The last meeting saw Bitcoin drop by 9%.

The analysis highlights that FOMC meeting weeks are typically associated with high volatility and downside risks for Bitcoin. Even if the market remains optimistic about a potential rate cut before the meeting, reactions following the announcement tend to be negative. Investors are advised to manage their positions cautiously.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 890 USDT with a 2.18% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 27, 2026, 16:07 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 890 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 890.080017 USDT, with a narrowed 2.18% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: ClawdBot's Overnight Success in Bitcoin Trading Market
data.description: ClawdBot has demonstrated remarkable success by achieving a 200% profit overnight through trading in the Bitcoin price prediction market on Polymarket. According to NS3.AI, the bot started with an initial investment of $100 and managed to increase it to $250 within a single night. This achievement highlights the potential effectiveness of automated trading tools in the cryptocurrency derivatives market, showcasing their ability to generate significant returns in a short period.

data.title: Three 1INCH investor addresses sold 36.36 million 1INCH tokens, causing the price to drop by 16.7%.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, three 1INCH investor addresses (0x2aD...1f06, 0x38c...6b12, 0xd36...bD30) sold 36.36 million 1INCH tokens, worth $5.04 million. As a result, the price of 1INCH fell by 16.7%.

data.title: Moonbirds: Nesting 2.0 launched, holders will receive birb tokens over the next 24 months.
data.description: Moonbirds announced the official launch of Nesting 2.0 on the X platform. Moonbirds, Mythics, and Oddities NFT holders can earn birb tokens through a new design mechanism aimed at aligning holders with the long-term growth of the ecosystem. Users who deposit NFTs into the nesting protocol will receive a corresponding soulbound NFT, and the NFT will no longer remain on the market during the nesting period. For the next 24 months, nested NFTs can claim 1/24 of their allocated amount on the 28th of each month. If only part of the month was nested before the claim date on the 28th, the corresponding amount will be claimed proportionally. All NFTs nested within the first 7 days will be considered to have been nested for a full month.

data.title: A contract on the BSC blockchain was attacked due to a design flaw, resulting in a loss of approximately $100,000.
data.description: BlockSec Phalcon announced on the X platform that its system detected an attack on an unknown contract on the BSC chain, resulting in a loss of approximately $100,000. The root cause was a design flaw in the burn pair mechanism. The attacker carried out the attack through two reverse swaps: first, by withdrawing 99.56% of the PGNLZ tokens from the pool through the first swap; then, during the second swap when selling PGNLZ, the transferFrom function triggered the destruction of 99.9% of the PGNLP tokens and executed a sync operation, causing the PGNLP price to rise. The attacker then used the manipulated price to withdraw almost all of the USDT from the pool.

data.title: CME Group Reports Significant Growth in Cryptocurrency Futures and Options
data.description:
CME Group has released a report detailing substantial growth in its cryptocurrency futures and options market. According to PANews, the report highlights that in 2025, the nominal principal of these contracts reached nearly $3 trillion, with an average daily trading volume of 280,000 contracts, equivalent to approximately $12 billion. The average daily open interest reached 313,000 contracts, around $26 billion. Compared to the previous year, the fourth quarter saw a 92% increase in trading volume and a doubling of open interest, with the number of Large Open Interest Holders reaching a record high of 1,039.

Bitcoin and Ethereum futures continued to provide liquidity, while Micro contracts and products like MET set new trading records. In the spot-quoted futures segment, QBTC achieved a single-day trading volume of 128,000 contracts on December 30, surpassing one million contracts for the month. The combined daily trading volume of spot-quoted futures, including QBTC, QETH, QSOL, and QXRP, reached 131,000 contracts. This growth supports CME's plans to expand its volatility index and TAS products in 2026.

data.title: Unknown Contract on BSC Chain Suffers $100,000 Loss Due to Design Flaw
data.description:
BlockSec Phalcon reported on the X platform that its system detected an attack on an unknown contract on the BSC chain, resulting in a loss of approximately $100,000. According to Odaily, the root cause was identified as a design flaw in the burn pair mechanism.

The attacker executed the attack through two reverse exchanges. Initially, they extracted 99.56% of PGNLZ tokens from the pool during the first exchange. Subsequently, during the second exchange, when selling PGNLZ, the transferFrom function triggered the destruction of 99.9% of PGNLP tokens and performed a sync operation. This led to an increase in the PGNLP price, allowing the attacker to exploit the manipulated price to withdraw nearly all USDT from the pool.

data.title: 500 PAXG Transferred Between Anonymous Addresses
data.description: At 23:35, 500 PAXG were transferred from one anonymous address to another, according to ChainCatcher. The transaction involved addresses starting with 0x4eE0 and 0xF562.
